Process_Function: Apply anode slurry uniformly onto copper foil to achieve target coating weight
Failure_Effect_Customer: Insufficient active material — reduced cell capacity — customer gets low energy density cell
Failure_Cause: Slurry viscosity out of range / pump pressure deviation
Prevention_Control: Viscosity check every 2 hours — slurry batch control
Recommended_Action: Implement SPC on coating weight — reduce measurement interval to every 30 min

Process_Function: Apply anode slurry uniformly onto copper foil to achieve target coating weight
Failure_Effect_Customer: Excess active material — risk of lithium plating — internal short circuit — safety hazard
Failure_Cause: Pump overpressure — recipe parameter drift
Prevention_Control: Pump pressure monitoring — recipe lock
Recommended_Action: Add automated line stop trigger if coating weight exceeds +3% of nominal

Process_Function: Remove NMP solvent completely during drying to meet residual solvent specification
Failure_Effect_Customer: Electrolyte contamination — degraded SEI layer — cycle life reduction — customer warranty claim
Failure_Cause: Oven temperature too low — drying speed too fast — insufficient dwell time
Prevention_Control: Oven temperature profile validation — speed interlocks
Detection_Control: Offline NMP residual measurement per lot (GC analysis)
Recommended_Action: Increase NMP measurement frequency — implement at-line FTIR for faster feedback

Process_Function: Maintain coating edge position within tolerance to ensure correct electrode geometry
Failure_Mode: Edge position deviation — coating too close to foil edge

Process_Function: Maintain coating edge position within tolerance to ensure correct electrode geometry

Process_Function: Compress coated electrode to target thickness and porosity for optimal ion transport

Process_Function: Compress coated electrode to target thickness and porosity for optimal ion transport

Process_Function: Maintain electrode surface quality free from defects during compression

Process_Function: Cut electrodes to precise width specification for cell assembly

Process_Function: Cut electrodes to precise width specification for cell assembly

Process_Function: Ensure electrode tab position is correct for welding in later process

Process_Function: Weld electrode tabs to current collector with sufficient mechanical and electrical quality

Process_Function: Weld electrode tabs to current collector with sufficient mechanical and electrical quality

Process_Function: Align anode and cathode with correct overhang to prevent lithium plating

Process_Function: Maintain separator integrity during winding to prevent direct electrode contact
